metadata.notes: Per-node microbenchmark on a 2×2 ortho quad, timed via GPU timestamp queries when available (timingMethod) with a wall-clock fence fallback. Each shader is measured at N and 2N passes per batch (stats.passesLo/passesHi); per-pass cost = (median(total@2N) − median(total@N)) / N so fixed per-batch overhead cancels. stats.msPerPass is authoritative; marginal points are normalized to the 2064×2208 reference resolution in the export.
